query: SELECT ai.id, ai.requestId, ai.status, ai.entryMethod, ai.qrCodeData, ai.rfidTag, ai.cardNumber, r.requestNumber, r.status as requestStatus FROM approvalInstances ai JOIN requests r ON ai.requestId = r.id WHERE ai.status = 'approved' LIMIT 10;
